title: Participation
description: Aggregate participation in a DFTA-funded program — the unduplicated client count for a program/site in a fiscal year. Canonical schema reconciling 'Number of Participants in NYC Aging funded Programs' (2td3-mfek, 18 columns). AGGREGATE ONLY: DFTA never publishes an individual older adult / client record to Open Data; participant-level intake lives inside DFTA's case-management systems and Aging Connect.

unduplicatedClients.description: 'Unduplicated Clients' — aggregate count, never an individual record.
